news.paragraph: Energy stocks have shown recent upward momentum, with reports noting premarket gains and significant year-to-date growth linked to ongoing geopolitical tensions in Iran. While the sector has seen gains, traders should watch for volatility surrounding the release of the consumer inflation report, which has caused broader equity futures to fall. This macro data point represents an imminent catalyst that could impact the sector's current trend.
headlines: Sector Update: Energy Stocks Rise Premarket Tuesday
Up 130% YTD, This ETF Can Double Again as Iran War Has No End in Sight
Exchange-Traded Funds, Equity Futures Fall Pre-Bell Tuesday Amid Consumer Inflation Report Release
Sector Update: Energy Stocks Gain Late Afternoon
